summary: Comprehensive phased implementation plan for Nishad Anil's portfolio website. Phase 1 covers static frontend (HTML/CSS/JS) with GitHub API integration, Docker + Nginx serving, and ngrok tunneling. Phase 2 (future) adds FastAPI backend with SQLite. Phase 3 (future) adds blog CMS, admin dashboard, and analytics. Includes complete project structure, architecture diagrams, Docker/nginx configs, and a decisions/ folder for task tracking.
